description: A merchandiser wants to create a new curated collection page for a 'Back to School' campaign.

nodes.task_description: Create a new collection page titled 'Back to School'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a new, empty collection page.

nodes.task_description: Add a list of specified products (SKUs for backpacks, notebooks, pens) to the collection.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully populates the collection with the correct items.

nodes.task_description: Make the collection visible on the main navigation menu.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the site's navigation to include a link to the new collection.
